title: Fig. 75 in A Review Of Dromaeosaurid Systematics And Paravian Phylogeny
author: Turner, Alan H.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 75. Reduced strict consensus cladogram of Paraves + Oviraptorosauria showing the number of extra steps required to place Epidexipteryx as a basal avialan (2 steps longer), or to place it at the base of Oviraptorosauria (1 step longer). Analysis conducted in TNT using positive constraints.
steps_raw: Fig. 75. Reduced strict consensus cladogram of Paraves + Oviraptorosauria showing the number of extra steps required to place Epidexipteryx as a basal avialan (2 steps longer), or to place it at the base of Oviraptorosauria (1 step longer). Analysis conducted in TNT using positive constraints.
